title: dioscorea paradoxa
intro: Dioscorea paradoxa, also known as the wild yam or Guinea yam, is a species of yam native to tropical Africa and parts of West Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Dioscorea paradoxa include its ability to support hormone production, relieve menstrual cramps and PMS symptoms, and lower blood pressure. Dioscorea paradoxa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried root, capsules, or teas, to be used for medicinal purposes.
